title: Shantadurga Kalangutkarin Temple
tagline: Shantadurga Kalangutkarin Temple — spiritual town of Goa

overview.short: Shri Shantadurga (Kalangutkarin) Devasthan Nanora is a Hindu temple in Nanoda village, Bicholim taluka in Goa.
overview.description: Shri Shantadurga (Kalangutkarin) Devasthan Nanora is a Hindu temple in Nanoda village, Bicholim taluka in Goa. The goddess Shantadurga is worshiped in the form of Vishweshwari.

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Kasarpal
topPlaces.description: Kasarpal is a town in the Bicholim region of Goa, which is in the North Goa district. It is about 14 km from the town of Mapusa.

topPlaces.name: Mahamaya Kalika Devasthan Kasarpal
topPlaces.description: Mahamaya Kalika Saunsthan ( Devanagari:श्री संस्थान महामाया कालिका ) is a temple complex in Kansarpal village of Bicholim taluka in the state of Goa,which belongs to daijna [ daivadnya ] bramins of Gomantak India. The presiding deity of the temple is Kali, worshipped in the form of Mahamaya.

topPlaces.name: Latambarcem
topPlaces.description: Latambarcem is a village located in the North Goa district in the state of Goa, India. In 2001, the population was 6296.

topPlaces.name: Sharvani Devasthan
topPlaces.description: Sharvani Devasthan is the temple of Shri Devi Sharvani (Sharavani) and Vetoba (Vetal). It is located near the town of Bicholim in North Goa district in the Indian state of Goa.

topPlaces.name: Sircaim
topPlaces.description: Sircaim (or Sirsaim) is a village situated in the Bardez sub-district or taluka of Goa, which lies along the west-coast of India. It lies close to or within the mining belt of North Goa.

topPlaces.name: Assonora
topPlaces.description: Assonora is a village located in the Bardez taluka of Goa, India. It is located in North Goa, 12 km (7.5 mi) away from Mapusa and 24 km (15 mi) away from Panaji.

topPlaces.name: Moitem
topPlaces.description: Moitem is a small village situated in the Bardez sub-district or taluka of Goa, which lies along the west-coast of India. It is in the vicinity of the Assonora water treatment plant, which caters to the water needs of much of North Goa.

topPlaces.name: Shirgao, Goa
topPlaces.description: Shirgao is a village in the Bicholim sub-district (taluka) of Goa, which is popular for its annual temple festival that includes fire-walking traditions.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Shantadurga Kalangutkarin Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Shantadurga Kalangutkarin Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Shantadurga Kalangutkarin Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Manohar International Airport, Mopa (North Goa) (13 km) and the nearest railway station is Vasco da Gama (Goa) (29 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Shantadurga Kalangutkarin Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Shantadurga Kalangutkarin Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Shantadurga Kalangutkarin Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Shantadurga Kalangutkarin Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Shantadurga Kalangutkarin Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Kasarpal, Mahamaya Kalika Devasthan Kasarpal, Latambarcem, Sharvani Devasthan, Sircaim.
